name: Yelp Fusion API
what_it_does: Business search and discovery API providing access to Yelp's database of 8M+ local businesses including restaurants, hours, reviews, photos, and ratings.
use_cases: Recommending nearby restaurants or businesses based on location and category
Surfacing business details (hours, phone, address, rating) in a concierge agent
Fetching user reviews to inform dining decisions
Building local business search into travel or lifestyle apps
Filtering restaurants by cuisine, price range, open hours, or distance
not_for: Making reservations (use OpenTable API for that)
Delivery ordering (use DoorDash or Uber Direct for that)
best_when: An agent needs to recommend or surface local restaurant and business information from a trusted, user-generated review database with minimal setup.
avoid_when: You need transactional capability (ordering, reservations), require more than 500 requests/day on the free tier, or need data freshness guarantees.

auth.notes: Simple API key passed as Bearer token in Authorization header. Easy for agents — no token refresh needed.

pricing.paid_tiers: Partner/enterprise tiers available with higher limits by contacting Yelp
pricing.notes: Free tier is generous for prototyping and low-volume agents. Paid tiers require business partnership negotiation — no self-serve upgrade path.

performance.rate_limits: 500 requests/day on free tier; higher limits via partnership

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clear HTTP status codes with descriptive error messages; rate limit errors include Retry-After header
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All endpoints are read-only GET requests — inherently idempotent
known_agent_gotchas: 500 requests/day free tier is easily exhausted in chatty agent loops — cache aggressively
Search results capped at 1000 total (offset + limit), pagination stops at 1000
No real-time data: business hours and info can lag actual business state
GraphQL endpoint has different rate limits than REST and is less documented
Display requirements: must show Yelp branding when displaying Yelp data per ToS

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced; API key auth is simple but no scopes or granular permissions — treat as all-or-nothing access
